question: Will SpaceX's IPO (ticker SPCX) price on or before June 11, 2026?
reason: SpaceX has publicly announced June 11, 2026, as the IPO pricing date.
evidence: SpaceX filed its S-1 prospectus with the SEC on May 20, 2026, confirming plans for a Nasdaq listing under the ticker SPCX, with pricing expected on June 11 and public trading beginning as early as June 12, 2026.
Reuters reported on May 15, 2026, that SpaceX is targeting a June 11 IPO pricing and has chosen Nasdaq for its listing.
SpaceXChart.com lists June 11, 2026, as the IPO pricing date, with trading set to begin on June 12, 2026.
